category_sources: Official OATH Toolkit page describes HOTP, TOTP, PSKC, command-line tools, libraries, and PAM module.
source_facts.description says it provides tools for one-time password authentication systems.
display_name_sources: Official site and README use the project name OATH Toolkit.
docs_sources: Official Codeberg Pages documentation index lists standalone OATH Toolkit docs.
Official oathtool man page documents the primary CLI included in source_facts.executables.
repo_sources: GitLab mirror README points users to the Codeberg project page and issue tracker.
Official contribute page names the Codeberg OATH Toolkit project and gives a git clone URL.
tags_sources: Official OATH Toolkit docs describe HOTP, TOTP, PSKC, CLI tools, libraries, and a PAM module.
source_facts.description and source_facts.executables list authentication tools oathtool and pskctool.
